explanation: This is Google's official domain. It uses HTTPS, the registered domain is spelled correctly, and there are no suspicious subdomains.
The registered domain is github.com. The rest of the address is only the user and repository path. Focus on the hostname before the first slash.
microsoft.com is Microsoft's official domain. The www subdomain is normal, and everything after it is an internal page path.
The registered domain is apple.com, and support is an official subdomain beneath it.
wikipedia.org is spelled correctly and contains no extra characters or disguised domain names.
The registered domain is openai.com, while /research is simply a page path on that site.
The registered domain is amazon.com. A long path is not automatically dangerous; verify the domain first.
accounts is a subdomain of google.com, so the real registered domain is still google.com.
paypal.com is spelled correctly. HTTPS is only one safety signal, so the domain must still be checked.
The registered domain netflix.com is spelled correctly, and /login is an internal login path.
The registered domain is google-account-check.example, not google.com. It also uses unencrypted HTTP.
paypal.com is only part of a misleading subdomain. The address is actually controlled by secure-payment.example.
The number 0 replaces the letter o, a common lookalike trick. The registered domain is not microsoft.com.
A brand name inside a URL does not prove ownership. This registered domain ends in .example, not apple.com.
The order-refund wording creates urgency, but the domain is not amazon.com. A brand name inside a URL is not proof of legitimacy.
An uppercase I is used to imitate a lowercase l, making the name resemble netflix even though the spelling is different.
The registered domain is not github.com. Trustworthy words such as security and alert do not prove that a site is safe.
A login page using a raw IP address with no verifiable brand domain is a major warning sign. This IP belongs to a documentation-only range.
This address uses HTTP, a vague bank label, and urgent wording without any verifiable official bank domain.
Read the hostname from right to left: the registered domain is login-check.example. accounts.google.com is only a misleading subdomain.
